from flask import Flask, jsonify, send_file

app = Flask(__name__)

_config_cache = None

def _load_config():
    global _config_cache
    if _config_cache is None:
        with open("/etc/app/config.json", "r") as f:
            _config_cache = f.read()
    return _config_cache

@app.route("/config")
def get_config():
    return _load_config()

@app.route("/terms")
def get_terms():
    return send_file("/app/static/terms_of_service.txt")

@app.route("/report")
def get_report():
    return send_file("/data/daily_report.csv", mimetype="text/csv")
